titleStmt.title: SII 22.365: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 365. (A.R. No. 365 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA—7th YEAR

summary.p: This is an unfinished epigraph, evidently intended to register a sale of land fed by three wells at Karandūr (village) belonging to Araśugaṇḍadēvaṉ Araśagaḷañjappiṟandāṉ alias Ayilaiyarāyaṉ of Pulvayal (?) in Vayalaga-nāḍu a division of Kōṉāḍu also called Kaḍalaḍaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍa-śōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam in Kuṉṟuśūḻ-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 7vatu koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātiṟaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu vayalakanāṭṭup pulaval Aracukaṇṭatevaṉ Aracakaḷañcappiṟantāṉāṉa Ayilaiyarāyaṉeṉ Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa karantūr vayalil karantūṟappiyāṉa
cuntaracoḻaṉ kuḷattālum putukkuḷattālum cuṭukāṭṭuk kuḷattālum nir pāyntu nelviḷaiyum nirnilamāṉa karantūr vayalil 5ḷu nala �m kiṇaṟu muṉṟum cuṭukāṭṭu vayalil 5ḷu nala �-m kiṇaṟu Iraṇṭum Āka 5 100 5 10 2pa-m kiṇaṟu Añcum Ivaiyiṟṟil maraṅkaḷum vilaik
kuṟaviṟpeṉ koḷviruḷiroveṉṟu Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu mukkālā vatu muṟkūṟa Immoḻi keṭṭuk kuṉṟucūḻṉāṭṭut tirunalakkuṉṟattu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Ātiśaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmi koyiṟ ka
ṇakkar koḷvomeṉṟu piṟkūṟa muṟkūṟiya Ayilaiyarāyaṉeṉ nāṉ viṟkiṉṟa karantūrvayal nilam nāṉmāvarai kiṇaṟu muṉṟu Itil vayakkal nilam Iraṇṭumāvaraikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ teṉkiḻai mūlaippaṟikāl nilamun
tirikaiyum Āka nilam Iraṇṭumāk kāṇikkup perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai ṭiya vāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai cuntara coḻaṉkuḷattu Iṟak
kik kūṭṭiṉa karaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ṣtops here Unfinished
Digital edition of SII 22.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
